overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a game engine depicting a medieval fantasy classroom or study hall with gothic vaulted ceilings, stone walls, and students seated at long wooden desks. Natural light streams through tall stained glass windows at the far end, illuminating the ornate central rug and creating a serene academic atmosphere.

segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand medieval classroom or study hall with gothic architecture. Students sit at long wooden desks along both sides of a central aisle covered by an ornate rug. The high vaulted stone ceiling and stained glass windows at the far end create a majestic academic atmosphere, with bookshelves and decorative elements lining the stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, sweeping view of a grand medieval study hall that emphasizes the majestic scale of a gothic academic environment. It begins by capturing the vastness of the room, where students are seated at long wooden desks flanking a central aisle. The perspective then draws the eye across an ornate rug that leads toward the far end of the hall, where light streams through tall stained glass windows. Finally, the scene settles on the interplay between the high vaulted stone ceilings and the bookshelves lining the walls, cementing a serene and scholarly atmosphere.
